titulo: Course Stories — Weekly Generation with Automatic Design
descricao: Every Friday, fetches next week's courses, matches background images, generates stories with dynamic banners (confirmed class / seats closed) via Placid and sends them for approval by email.
problema: The marketing team had to manually create dozens of course stories every week, with up-to-date seat and status information.
resultado: Stories generated automatically with up-to-date data and consistent design, ready for approval.
metrica: Automatic weekly story generation for every course
destaques: Automatic matching of course to background image
Grouped by unit in the approval email
Design via Placid with a configurable template
